qualifications.name: Bachelor of Education in Early Childhood Care and Education (ECCE)
notes: Field: Early Childhood Care and Education.

Additional NWU requirements: National Senior Certificate with endorsement for bachelor's studies and appropriate subject combinations and performance levels as per Government Gazette 31231 (2008); Language of instruction: Home Language and First Additional Language level 4 (50-59%); To register First Additional Language as Language of Learning and Teaching, level 5 (60-69%) is required for the First Additional Language; Languages available as Language of Learning and Teaching: Afrikaans, English, isiXhosa, Sesotho or Setswana; Languages available as Language of Conversational Competence: Afrikaans, isiXhosa, Sesotho and Setswana; Language of Learning and Teaching and Language of Conversational Competence may not be the same language; Clearance certificate in terms of the Children's Act, Act 38 of 2005; Basic computer literacy skills, access to a computer and sufficient Wi-Fi.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Education (BEd) in Foundation Phase (Foundation Phase (Grade R-3))
notes: Additional NWU requirements: MC: English/Setswana as Home Language AND English/Setswana as First Additional Language; PC: Afrikaans/English/Sesotho/Setswana as Home Language AND Afrikaans/English/Setswana as First Additional Language; VC: Afrikaans/English/IsiZulu/Sesotho as Home Language AND Afrikaans/English/IsiZulu/Sesotho as First Additional Language; Distance: Afrikaans/English/IsiZulu/Sepedi/Sesotho/Setswana as Home Language AND Afrikaans/English/Setswana as First Additional Language.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Education (BEd) in Intermediate Phase (Mathematics, Science and Technology)
notes: Additional NWU requirements: PC: Afrikaans/Sesotho/Setswana as Home Language AND English as First Additional Language; VC: Afrikaans/English/IsiZulu/Sesotho as Home Language AND Afrikaans/English/IsiZulu/Sesotho as First Additional Language.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Education (BEd) in Intermediate Phase (Life Skills and Social Sciences)
notes: Field: Life Skills and Social Sciences.

Additional NWU requirements: PC: Afrikaans/Sesotho/Setswana as Home Language AND English as First Additional Language; VC: Afrikaans/English/IsiZulu/Sesotho as Home Language AND Afrikaans/English/IsiZulu/Sesotho as First Additional Language; Distance: Afrikaans/IsiZulu/Sepedi/Sesotho/Setswana as Home Language AND English as First Additional Language.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Education (BEd) in Senior and Further Education and Training (Mechanical Technology / Civil Technology / Electrical Technology)
notes: Field: Mechanical Technology / Civil Technology / Electrical Technology.

Additional NWU requirements: Home Language AND First Additional Language level 4; Recommended: level 3 (40-49%) in Physical/Technical Sciences and any Technology subject; Students who do not meet minimum requirements may be allowed entry on condition that they pass bridging modules MTEC 111 and MTEC 121 during the first two years of study.
